description: Create a content slide on population growth in urban areas with a left-side infographic comparing 2018 vs 2050 by region and a right sidebar of key takeaways.

header.headline: 97% of all future population growth is expected to take place in urban areas of less developed regions, where the population is projected to increase from 3.0 billion in 2018 to 5.1 billion in 2050
header.sub: Urban areas with populations of 1 million or more, 2018 and 2050

items.text: 97% of projected global population growth through 2050 will occur in urban areas of less developed regions.
Asia remains the largest concentration of urban population in cities of 1M+ people, growing from 1.758B in 2018 to 2.583B in 2050.
Africa sees the fastest expansion, with urban population in 1M+ cities rising from 587M to 1.489B by 2050.
Europe is comparatively flat, increasing only slightly from 547M to 551M by 2050.
